channel.title: GitHub TypeSpec Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of TypeSpec in GitHub

item.title: Azure/azure-rest-api-specs
item.description: The source for REST API specifications for Microsoft Azure.

item.title: microsoft/Agents
item.description: The Microsoft 365 Agent SDK simplifies building full stack, multichannel, trusted agents for platforms including M365, Teams, Copilot Studio, and Webchat.
